五星好评，作者加油","text_exts":[{"e":68,"s":65,"text":"聊天群","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%81%8A%E5%A4%A9%E7%BE%A4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774201523AA100F17%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227519112297365979966%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227490405412802415678%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%81%8A%E5%A4%A9%E7%BE%A4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1750684250,"group_id":"7490405412802415678","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我直接看广告全领。。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4qXgU9HqjXEX9s2P3Wu5mFEs2qyoMyfUG+ECK/k53nr","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5e3eafe0744c4cd19c920090031e09e0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788714&x-signature=zWjGYHJBugqmcMg0LEL2SPEaYEs%3D","user_id":"1126350386369911","user_name":"广告区玩家"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1126350386369911","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1786954330,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7490405412802415678","book_info":{"abstract":"【聊天群+无女主】
楚墨刚穿越，天空就传来一道不男不女的声音。
“我曾说过，谁弱伤她一分，我便屠他满门，而今小不点在你们宗门受伤，我便屠你全宗上下满门！”
魔焰滔天的魔尊立于天地间，不断拍下大手印，身边的师兄弟们尽数被拍成小熊饼干，就连宗主也被一招秒杀。
好消息：穿越了！可以修仙了！
坏消息：刚穿越就遇到魔尊屠宗！还是为了一个女的！
就在这个万分危急的时候，楚墨被拉入了一个聊天群。
【刚穿越，求问，如何能在没有任何资源背景的情况下，和女帝在玄武门互掏。】
【同问，刚穿越得知自己修为因为离婚被分走一半，怎么才能拿回来。】
【我是皇帝，但我是躺赢狗，女将军刚说，要带领的八十万大军来找我要说法，求解。】
楚墨看着群里鸡飞狗跳的求助信息，又抬头看了一眼已经杀疯的魔尊，默默打字。
【纯萌新，问，现在魔尊要为女主屠宗灭门，该怎么活命，对了，我修为足足练气初期，他修为区区渡劫巅峰。】
但很快的，楚墨就有了点子，并一举成为群里的点子王。
诶！我有一个点子！
